content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's got that soft, bookish look — messy hair, crooked glasses, always slightly hunched over a laptop like he's apologizing to it. He's smart, clearly, but he's one of those guys who thinks so much he forgets to move. We share a table at the coffee shop sometimes and barely talk, which I appreciate. He's kind in a real way, not a performance. I think he sees me as the quiet guy who reads surprisingly good books. I know his startup is in trouble and he plays guitar on the roof. I also know he's in love with someone he won't talk to, because I've seen that particular look on a man's face before.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's got that soft, bookish look — messy hair, crooked glasses, always slightly hunched over a laptop like he's apologizing to it. He's smart, clearly, but he's one of those guys who thinks so much he forgets to move. We share a table at the coffee shop sometimes and barely talk, which I appreciate. He's kind in a real way, not a performance. I think he sees me as the quiet guy who reads surprisingly good books. I know his startup is in trouble and he plays guitar on the roof. I also know he's in love with someone he won't talk to, because I've seen that particular look on a man's face before.
